title: retinanet_resnet50_fpn end-to-end torchvision parity
description: Phase A Item 1 of real-artifact-driven development. Add retinanet_resnet50_fpn (legacy COCO_V1) to ferrotorch and verify end-to-end against torchvision via verify_pretrained_inference.py harness. Pattern: same playbook as #1141 (FasterRCNN/MaskRCNN). Key arch differences vs FasterRCNN: P3-P7 FPN (not P2-P6) with LastLevelP6P7 (3x3 stride-2 convs, not LastLevelMaxPool); 9 anchors/loc (3 sizes x 3 ratios); shared 4-conv classification + regression heads (cls outputs A*num_classes=819, reg outputs A*4=36); per-class sigmoid scoring; box weights (1,1,1,1); single-stage (no RPN, no RoIHeads). Expected: 6/6 PASS on verify harness (abs_score_top5<=0.02, n_det_ratio>=0.80). No follow-ups.
